info.title: Policies
info.description:
Manage security policies that define which rules apply to which assets. Policies control how security findings are evaluated across your cloud environment.

**Required license:** This feature is included with a Cortex XSIAM Premium license. It is also included with any other Cortex XSIAM product that has the Cloud Runtime Security or Cloud Posture Security add-ons.

post.description: Public API to get all policies.

API response with List of Policies.summary: API response with List of Policies

data.name: Default Cloud Posture Security Policy
data.description: Comprehensive default security policy that identifies risks across you entire cloud security estate. It leverages best practices to scan and detect attack paths, misconfigurations, vulnerabilities, identity risks, data risks, network exposures, and other security gaps across your cloud infrastructure and applications, enabling proactive management and mitigation of cloud security risks.

err_extra.message: SEARCH_TYPE 'EBQ' is not supported. Allowed values: EQ, CONTAINS, NCONTAINS, NEQ
Internal Server Error

value.name: Default Cloud Posture Security Policy

It leverages best practices to scan and detect attack paths, misconfigurations, vulnerabilities, identity risks, data risks, network exposures, and other security gaps across your cloud infrastructure and applications, enabling proactive management and mitigation of cloud security risks.
